zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Kirkpatrick於1401年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德時，她的父親Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick78歲，母親Isobel Torthorwald26歲。她於1420年3月14日與John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1436年在她的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Kirkpatrick于1401年出生在苏格兰度福利爾托瓦爾德时，她的父亲Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick78岁，母亲Isobel Torthorwald26岁。她于1420年3月14日与John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald在英国苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1436年在她的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Kirkpatrick was born in 1401, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, was 78 and her mother, Isobel Torthorwald, was 26. She married John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald on 14 March 1420, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1436, in her hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Kirkpatrick est née en 1401, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, avait 78 ans et sa mère, Isobel Torthorwald, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald le 14 mars 1420, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1436, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Kirkpatrick 1401 in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick 78 und ihre Mutter Isobel Torthorwald 26. Sie hat am 14. März 1420 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1436 im Alter von 35 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Kirkpatrick è nata il nel 1401 nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, aveva 78 anni e sua madre, Isobel Torthorwald, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald il 14 marzo 1420, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1436, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kirkpatrickが1401年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで生まれた時，父Sir Duncan Kirkpatrickは78歳，母Isobel Torthorwaldは26歳であった。1420年3月14日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでJohn Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1436年に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kirkpatrick(이)가 1401년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick(은)는 78세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isobel Torthorwald(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1420년 3월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 그녀의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Kirkpatrick nasceu em 1401, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, tinha 78 anos e sua mãe, Isobel Torthorwald, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald em 14 de março de 1420, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1436, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Kirkpatrick родилась в 1401 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick было 78 лет, а матери, которую звали Isobel Torthorwald, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald 14 марта 1420 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1436 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Kirkpatrick nació en 1401, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, tenía 78 años y su mamá, Isobel Torthorwald, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald el 14 de marzo de 1420, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1436, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
